events.label: reasoning
events.text: The scenario describes structural bolting work at rough-complete stage where turn-of-nut match marks are absent or not rotated. This is a clear non-compliance with RCSC Specification requirements for turn-of-nut method, which requires match marking and rotation to specified turns.

  "actions": [
    "Snug-tighten all bolts in connection and apply match marks",
    "Rotate nuts/bolts the required turn from snug-tight per RCSC table",
    "Re-inspect and document match marks before connection acceptance"

  "rationale": "RCSC turn-of-nut method requires a verified snug-tight condition, match marking, and rotation to the specified turn. Absent match marks indicate the pretensioning step was not performed or cannot be verified, making the connection non-compliant for slip-critical or pretensioned joints.",
  "references": ["RCSC Specification Section 8.2 (Turn-of-Nut Method)"]
}
